## AbstractCompoundDefType.initializer property

Initializer expression for the compound.

**Signature:**

```typescript
initializer?: InitializerDataModel | undefined;
```

## Remarks

Contains the initializer expression associated with this compound, typically used for concept definitions that include a defining expression. This property captures initializer content extracted from 'initializer' XML elements in the Doxygen compound output.
